basic_details.job_title: AVNL Executive and Non-Executive Recruitment 2026 (Short Notice) - Apply Online for 1213 Junior Technician, Junior Manager and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Junior Technician, Junior Manager, Assistant Manager, Deputy Manager & Others
basic_details.short_information: Armoured Vehicles Nigam Limited (AVNL), a Government of India Defence PSU under the Ministry of Defence, has released a new recruitment notification for 2026. The organization is inviting applications for various Executive and Non-Executive posts including Junior Technician, Junior Manager, Assistant Manager, Deputy Manager and Senior Manager roles.

important_dates.raw: Notification Release Date: 21st June 2026 Last Date to Apply: 15 Days from the date the link is made available on the website

selection_process: Written Examination / CBT Trade Test (for Technician posts) Interview (for Manager level posts) Document Verification Medical Examination
how_to_apply: Register with valid email ID and mobile number

rows.armoured_vehicles_nigam_limited_avnl: Junior Technician, Junior Manager, Assistant Manager, Deputy Manager & Others

content_sections.heading: Important Dates
content_sections.text: Notification Release Date: 21st June 2026 Last Date to Apply: 15 Days from the date the link is made available on the website

content_sections.heading: Who Can Apply for AVNL Recruitment 2026?
content_sections.text: Junior Technician: 10th Pass + ITI (NCVT/SCVT) Junior Manager: B.E / B.Tech / MBA Assistant Manager: Engineering / Finance / CS / MBA Deputy Manager: Engineering / Management / IT background Age limit varies from post to post (generally up to 30–35 years)

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Written Examination / CBT Trade Test (for Technician posts) Interview (for Manager level posts) Document Verification Medical Examination

content_sections.heading: AVNL Executive and Non-Executive Recruitment 2026 Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is AVNL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: AVNL Recruitment 2026 is a hiring process by Armoured Vehicles Nigam Limited (Defence PSU) for Executive and Non-Executive posts on fixed-term basis.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are announced in AVNL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of around 1213 vacancies have been announced across multiple posts.

faq.question: Q3. What are the major posts in AVNL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Major posts include Junior Technician, Junior Manager, Assistant Manager, Deputy Manager, and Senior Manager.

faq.question: Q4. What is the qualification for managerial posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must have B.E/B.Tech, MBA or equivalent qualifications depending on the post.

faq.question: Q5. What is the qualification required for Junior Technician post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have 10th Pass with ITI (NCVT/SCVT) in relevant trade.
